mapper.sql: CASE WHEN e.status = 'draft' THEN 'draft' WHEN e.status = 'cancelled' THEN 'cancelled' WHEN NOW() < e.signup_deadline THEN 'signup_open' WHEN NOW() >= e.signup_deadline AND NOW() < e.start_time THEN 'signup_closed' WHEN NOW() >= e.start_time AND NOW() < e.end_time THEN 'ongoing' ELSE 'finished' END
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, e.title, e.cover_url AS coverUrl, e.location, e.start_time AS startTime, e.end_time AS endTime, e.signup_deadline AS signupDeadline, e.max_participants AS maxParticipants, e.need_audit AS needAudit, e.status AS baseStatus, AS runtimeStatus, e.signup_count AS signupCount, e.approved_count AS approvedCount, e.checkin_count AS checkinCount, (e.max_participants - e.signup_count) AS remainingSlots, e.description FROM event_info e LEFT JOIN event_category c ON c.id = e.category_id WHERE e.id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1
